ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the security being traded */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" REAL /* Number of shares traded */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector classification (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification (e.g., software, banking) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date on which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Additional fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, volume spike) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Activation status of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date for the index value */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_data" (
  "index_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related market index */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_value" REAL /* Opening value of the index */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the index during the session */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the index during the session */,
  "close_value" REAL /* Closing value of the index */,
  "adj_close_value" REAL /* Adjusted closing value for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related security */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security added to the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the security was added to the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was assigned the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
